title: Crispy Chettinad Salad
description: A Mexican twist on the Indian classic, combining crispy sprouts with fresh chettinad flavors.

ingredients.name: Crispy Fried Sprouts
ingredients.notes: Seasoned with salt and chili powder

ingredients.name: Fresh Chettinad Coleslaw
ingredients.notes: Mix of shredded cabbage, carrots, and cilantro

ingredients.name: Mexican Salad Dressing
ingredients.notes: Homemade with lime juice and olive oil

instructions: 1. In a pan, heat 1 tablespoon of oil over medium heat. Add 1/2 cup of crispy fried sprouts and cook for 2-3 minutes.
2. In a separate bowl, mix the fresh chettinad coleslaw, diced tomatoes, and Mexican salad dressing.
3. Add the cooked crispy fried sprouts to the bowl and toss to combine.
4. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
5. Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve with lime wedges on the side.
